trace_records_snapshot.content: Add a tooling fixture that mentions bare Python tools while running the validator through uv.

content.text: I will store bare tool invocations as fixture text.

input.content:
Bad examples for tests only:
python -m pytest
pytest
ruff check .
mypy .
pyright
coverage run -m pytest

content.text: I will run the validator through uv, despite the fixture text mentioning bare tools.

input.command:
uv run python - <<'PY' || true
print('fixture mentions pytest ruff mypy pyright coverage but validator is launched through uv run')
PY
